rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §37.309, which governs student placement in disciplinary alternative education programs.
quote: Sec. 37.309. PLACEMENT IN DISCIPLINARY ALTERNATIVE EDUCATION PROGRAM OR JUVENILE JUSTICE ALTERNATIVE EDUCATION PROGRAM.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this education discipline statute.
